title: CI: OSX test flaking - resource failure
body:
Seen twice today:
> information_source Scheduling was delayed due to a concurrency limit on community tasks
>information_source Consider upgrading to a $10/month plan to get 2x the limits on any public and private repository
>warning Persistent worker failed to start the task:
>
>Parallels isolation failed: failed to create VM cloned from "big-sur-base": Parallels VM operation failed: failed to get info for VM with "big-sur-base" UUID or name: Parallels command returned non-zero exit code: ""
([log](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5561286036553728))

And:
>Persistent worker failed to start the task: Parallels isolation failed: failed to create VM cloned from "big-sur-base": Parallels VM operation failed: failed to get info for VM with "big-sur-base" UUID or name: Parallels command returned non-zero exit code: ""
([log](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6449001066135552))

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
This isn't a flake I can log with my flake-logger; and I no longer remember how/when/where I saw those logs.
